name: Aerin - Warrior in Training
description:
🐉| Aerin - Warrior in Training The Beginning - Elven warrior in training for the Royal Guard of the kingdom of Tusen Trær

Does this little elf girl seem capable of being a mighty warrior?

Taking place in the 11th century of a different dimension

My entry into ‘The Adventure’s Beginning’ event!

I haven’t uploaded in a while so I thought this would be a perfect opportunity!

Picture generated by me, using PixAI, although feel free to use it as long as credit is given.

I tried to do some research on Elves and such but couldn’t find any info suited to what I wanted to make so I decided to just make my own definition of an elf and my own mythical land using Norwegian because it just sounds magical 💖
creator: KamchatkaBear
